name: Nj.com
title_tag: Manage Your Business Information on NJ.com with Synup
detailed_paragraph:
Nj.com + Synup

Add, claim, edit business listings & reviews on Nj.com with Synup's listings & review management tools.

What is Nj.com?

Nj.com is a prominent news and information website serving the state of New Jersey. It delivers comprehensive coverage of local news, events, sports, and more, catering to the informational needs of residents and those interested in developments in New Jersey.

Why Nj.com + Synup?

  • Complete Control Over Listings: With the ability to manage your business listings on Nj.com, you maintain full control over your online presence, ensuring your business is represented accurately.
  • Broaden Your Reach: Adding your business to Nj.com through Synup means increased visibility. Help potential customers discover you, effectively expanding your reach.
  • Accurate Business Information: Enhance trust and credibility by publishing accurate information on Nj.com.
  • Customer Engagement: View and respond back to reviews on Nj.com, fostering a positive relationship with your customers, showing that you value their feedback and are attentive to their needs.

How to integrate Nj.com + Synup?

The Nj.com integration is available to all Synup listings plan subscribers. To view & manage the Nj.com integration:

  1. Visit the Listings tab on Synup's console.
  2. Navigate to the Premium Listings section.
  3. Click on the Nj.com logo to manage the Synup + Nj.com integration and associated settings.
integration_summary: For businesses, managing location data on Facebook now a breeze with Synup.
